note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1 matches a raw-payload commitment; vector 2 matches an invoice-locator-template commitment; vector 3 is a mismatch; vector 4 is the empty-input finite-gate edge.

vectors.name: payload_commitment_match
vectors.description: memo_hex is the SHA-256 of the supplied payload -- payload_commitment_match true, overall_valid true.

output_payload.note: Integrity check only -- distinct from screen_tip20_transfer_batch (art-38 AML/Travel Rule screening). Memo is a fixed 32-byte hash-or-locator commitment per docs.tempo.xyz/guide/payments/transfer-memos.

vectors.name: invoice_locator_commitment_match
vectors.description: memo_hex is the SHA-256 of the default invoice locator template (invoice:{invoice_id}) -- invoice_locator_match true.

output_payload.note: Integrity check only -- distinct from screen_tip20_transfer_batch (art-38 AML/Travel Rule screening). Memo is a fixed 32-byte hash-or-locator commitment per docs.tempo.xyz/guide/payments/transfer-memos.

vectors.name: payload_commitment_mismatch
vectors.description: memo_hex does not match the SHA-256 of the supplied payload -- overall_valid false, PAYLOAD_COMMITMENT_MISMATCH flag.

output_payload.note: Integrity check only -- distinct from screen_tip20_transfer_batch (art-38 AML/Travel Rule screening). Memo is a fixed 32-byte hash-or-locator commitment per docs.tempo.xyz/guide/payments/transfer-memos.

vectors.name: empty_input_finite_gate
vectors.description: Empty policy_parameters -- memo missing/short, no commitment source supplied, overall_valid false, no NaN/Infinity.

output_payload.note: Integrity check only -- distinct from screen_tip20_transfer_batch (art-38 AML/Travel Rule screening). Memo is a fixed 32-byte hash-or-locator commitment per docs.tempo.xyz/guide/payments/transfer-memos.
